title: thelypteris hendersonii
intro: Thelypteris hendersonii, a species of fern native to Hawaii, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris hendersonii include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in topical applications to promote healing and reduce inflammation.
